value.value: @if(equals(activity('CallHealthCheckAPI').status, 'Succeeded'), if(contains(string(activity('CallHealthCheckAPI').output), 'error'), coalesce(activity('CallHealthCheckAPI').output.error.message, 'Unknown error in response body'), 'No error detected'), if(not(empty(coalesce(activity('CallHealthCheckAPI').error?.message, ''))), activity('CallHealthCheckAPI').error.message, concat('Activity failed with status: ', activity('CallHealthCheckAPI').status)))

@string(if(and(not(equals(variables('error_message'), 'No error detected')), or(equals(pipeline().parameters.env, 'prod'), greater(pipeline().parameters.alert_threshold, 0))), if(greater(length(variables('error_message')), pipeline().parameters.alert_threshold), true, false), false))
@concat('No alert needed. Status: ', variables('error_status'), ' | Env: ', pipeline().parameters.env, ' | Threshold: ', string(pipeline().parameters.alert_threshold))

body.value: @json(concat('{"to":"', pipeline().parameters.error_email, '","subject":"ADF Alert: ', variables('error_status'), '","body":"Error Details: ', replace(variables('error_message'), '"', '\"'), '","environment":"', pipeline().parameters.env, '","severity":"', if(greater(length(variables('error_message')), mul(pipeline().parameters.alert_threshold, 2)), 'CRITICAL', 'WARNING'), '","retryCount":', string(pipeline().parameters.retry_count), ',"timestamp":"', utcNow(), '"}'))

value.value: @if(equals(variables('should_alert'), 'true'), concat('ALERTED_', variables('error_status'), '_retry_', string(pipeline().parameters.retry_count)), if(equals(variables('error_message'), 'No error detected'), concat('COMPLETED_OK_', pipeline().parameters.env), concat('SUPPRESSED_', variables('error_status'), '_below_threshold_', string(pipeline().parameters.alert_threshold))))

body.value: @json(concat('{"pipelineRunId":"', pipeline().RunId, '","pipelineName":"', pipeline().Pipeline, '","finalStatus":"', variables('error_status'), '","errorMessage":"', replace(coalesce(variables('error_message'), 'none'), '"', '\"'), '","alertSent":', variables('should_alert'), ',"environment":"', pipeline().parameters.env, '","retryConfig":', string(pipeline().parameters.retry_count), ',"alertThreshold":', string(pipeline().parameters.alert_threshold), ',"completedAt":"', utcNow(), '"}'))

value.value: @if(equals(activity('CallFinalStatusAPI').status, 'Succeeded'), concat('Pipeline completed successfully. Final status: ', variables('error_status'), ' | Alert sent: ', variables('should_alert'), ' | Error: ', if(equals(variables('error_message'), 'No error detected'), 'None', variables('error_message')), ' | API response code: ', coalesce(string(activity('CallFinalStatusAPI').output?.statusCode), '200')), concat('Final status API call failed: ', coalesce(activity('CallFinalStatusAPI').error?.message, 'Unknown failure'), ' | Fallback status: ', variables('error_status')))
